title: JSON1 accepts form-feed (char(12)) as a white-space character
description:
drh added on 2015-10-16 15:00:33:
The JSON extension is accepting and form-feed (0xc) as
whitespace.  But RFC-7159 says that only space (0x20), tab (0x09),
line-feed (0x0a) and carriage-return (0x0d) are whitespace for JSON.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_json (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data TEXT NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_json WHERE data LIKE '%\f%';
SELECT json_extract(data, '$.key') FROM test_json WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: JSON accepts form-feed as a whitespace character
